planning_system_mode.description: none = no external TPS; tps_driven = inbound provides planning_status and horizons apply

on_horizon_breach.description: Behavior when a provisional order reaches firm_by_at: auto firm if all data complete (and outside freeze), or always raise order.firming_due

default_auto_firm.description: Default value applied to new orders when auto_firm is omitted by integration/UI

allow_order_override_auto_firm.description: If true, order.auto_firm can override tenant default

sea_handoff.description: Controls behavior when a sea leg completes (e.g., port gate_out) and the first AU domestic leg should be created/firmed automatically.

match_strategy.description: How to match an inbound sea event to a Provisional AU leg to create/firm

required_fields.description: All fields that must be present/true before auto-create/firm is allowed
